title: Barezz (disambiguation)
content:
'''Barezz''' could refer to the following individuals:
*'''[[Inglemenn Barezz]]''', an agent for the [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Mar Barezz]]''', an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agent.
*'''[[Winn Barezz]]''', an Imperial [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] stationed on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].
*'''[[Arlan Barrezz]]''', an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
*'''[[Kaazo Barrezz]]''', an individual associated with the [[White Thranta Shipping Company]].

{{Disambig}}
